label: Sr. .NET Developer at Randstad Digital
headline: Senior .NET Developer — C#, ASP.NET, SQL, Web Applications, Full Life Cycle Development

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer
description: Designed, coded, analyzed, tested, and documented ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI services with RESTful OData and SOAP endpoints backed by Oracle using nHibernate, Entity Framework, and PL/SQL, adhering to full life cycle development techniques.
Implemented configurable reporting pipelines to ensure data traceability and audit trails, reflecting strong SQL skills and best practices.
Created responsive web interfaces with CSS3, Flexbox, Bootstrap, and AngularJS, and maintained WinForms clients and Xamarin Forms mobile applications.
Led delivery of GLP-compliant lab software, guided release engineering and Azure DevOps practices, and mentored developers through code reviews and pairing.
Interfaced with users and QA on GLP expectations, ensuring enhancements, maintenance, and problem resolution for existing applications met specifications.

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Designed, developed, and maintained .NET Core services with Hangfire and Entity Framework over PostgreSQL and SQL Server to drive insurance auto-protect workflows, demonstrating strong SQL skills.
Developed and maintained .NET WinForms and web applications, designing and preparing web program coding for business applications.
Established unit-testing patterns for WinForms and service code, conducting unit testing to ensure compliance to specifications.
Clarified service boundaries and domain concepts, contributing to early domain-driven design adoption.
Documented patterns and deployment steps, creating essential technical documents for team enablement.
Collaborated with product and support to triage production issues and refactor risky areas for stability, addressing problem resolution for existing applications.

rural-sourcing.title: Senior Software Developer
description: Delivered Microsoft-stack projects for multiple clients, focusing on WinForms, ASP.NET, and SQL Server work, applying full life cycle development techniques.
Planned and tracked sprints, risks, and milestones, preparing routine periodic project status reports and communicating with customers and stakeholders.
Mentored junior and mid-level developers on coding standards, testing habits, and practical estimation.
Conducted code reviews and production readiness checks to ensure predictable releases, contributing to robust software development.
Acted as a hands-on contributor, designing, coding, and debugging features for backend and desktop applications.

prestage-farms.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Led a team of 6 developers and 3 QA to modernize VB6 accounting and inventory systems into a single WinForms .NET application, redesigning and preparing program coding for business applications.
Analyzed legacy VB6 patterns and built transformation modules to automate conversion to VB.NET, preserving business logic and analyzing automation requests.
Consolidated 8+ standalone modules into one cohesive desktop experience with role-based security.
Built a new reporting frontend that supported legacy dot-matrix outputs and added PDF generation and viewing, reflecting strong SQL skills for reporting.
Ran Agile roadmaps and milestones, creating work plans and schedules, and coordinating stakeholders and demos to deliver the modernization ahead of schedule.
Drove quality practices and regression coverage, preparing test data and conducting unit testing to ensure compliance for the VB6-to-.NET cutover.

solid-earth.title: Application Developer/Architect
description: Developed and maintained RETS client and server software on Oracle and C#, tuning RETS performance, protocol compliance, and data handling, demonstrating strong SQL skills and best practices.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends where branding and business rules were driven by XML, designing and preparing web program coding for specialized business applications.
Created a market analytics and statistics module, developing and documenting computer software programs and systems.
Coordinated deployments and maintenance windows with MLS stakeholders, interfacing with users and customers and preparing routine project status reports.
Provided ongoing support and troubleshooting for MLS customers, addressing maintenance and problem resolution for existing applications.

not-rocket-science.title: Programmer/Analyst
description: Built a C# mobile application for a Sheriff's department to capture and sync field data, demonstrating full life cycle development techniques.
Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server development for Zen-Noh Grain, supporting inventory and operations workflows with strong SQL skills.
Created an ActionScript + ASP.NET tracking application for shipments and tug boats with a custom web backend, preparing web program coding for business applications.
Designed database schemas and service endpoints, analyzing, testing, and documenting computer software programs and systems.
Worked directly with clients to prioritize features and ship iterations quickly as a consultant, interfacing with users to gain understanding for enhancements and problem resolution.

pk-promotions.title: Web Developer/Consultant
description: Built a web-based commodity production management system using ASP and SQL Server, demonstrating strong SQL skills for business applications.
Implemented product evolution tracking and created sales and marketing tools to support campaigns, preparing web program coding.
Delivered applications with database-backed forms while tailoring flows to a small team’s processes, conducting full life cycle development.
Worked closely with the owner to refine requirements and roll out incremental improvements, interfacing with users to ensure understanding for enhancements and problem resolution.
